subtitleTemplates.far: A practical planning guide for people moving from {countryName} to the Netherlands, focused on documents, timeline sequencing, and early setup steps.
subtitleTemplates.near: A practical relocation overview for people moving from {countryName} to the Netherlands, with route awareness and first-step priorities.
subtitleTemplates.default: A practical guide to plan a move from {countryName} to the Netherlands.

far.intro: Long-haul moves often involve choosing between luggage-only and shipping household goods, and planning for longer lead times and customs.
notes: Decide early between luggage-only and shipment; shared container vs full container affects cost and timing.
Build extra buffer for transit and customs; temporary housing may need to overlap with shipment arrival.
Plan document and customs requirements for household goods in advance.

near.intro: For nearby European moves, logistics are often simpler but still worth planning—especially if you are bringing a vehicle or larger items.
notes: Travel with essentials first; smaller shipments or van moves may be enough.
Check customs and registration rules if bringing a vehicle or high-value items.

costSection.disclaimer: Costs are indicative and vary by timing, route, and supplier. Use the relocation cost estimator for a personalized range.

scenariosSection.intro: These scenarios show how different move types often change the order of preparation. They can help you choose the right planning path and use the tools with a better starting point.

toolsSection.intro: Use these tools to turn the country guide into a practical step-by-step plan.

beforeMove: Confirm your route and list required documents.
Set a relocation timeline with document lead times.
arrivalWeek: Start address and admin setup tasks.
Track appointment confirmations and reference numbers.
first90Days: Stabilize housing, banking, and insurance setup.
Review long-term admin and routine milestones.

far: Build extra buffer time for long-haul travel and shipping.
near: Use shorter travel time to stage move steps in smaller phases.

checklistPreview.summary: Use the tools below to turn this guide into a personalized step-by-step plan.
